summary: Removed out-of-scope/broken commands (static/*, add/*, hub, tail) and added pp:happy-args dogfood fixtures to identifier-lookup commands.
reason: static/* hit a different host (400), add/* and hub need publisher auth, tail GETs /<resource> which has no PodcastIndex endpoint; lookup-by-id commands needed real fixture identifiers to pass live dogfood.
validated_outcome: Live full dogfood 148/148 after trim + fixtures.
